phase_5.approval_basis: End-to-end LLOYD verification: 4/4 legs OK (was 3/4 in predecessor's P6); rag-search returned 10 results from LLOYD .py files via Ollama-only path; zero LLOYD-data pollution in coderef-core (only intentional rag-search.ts follow-on edit); chunks_indexed=21/21 (was 0/21 before this WO).
phase_5.reason: End-to-end LLOYD verification gate. Confirms the predecessor WO's promise (unified pipeline works end-to-end on external project) is fulfilled.

history.note: Successor to WO-UNIFIED-CODEREF-PIPELINE-001. Bundles the 3 follow-ups recorded in P6-VERIFICATION.md (SQLite --reset bug, rag-index exit-code semantics, Python chunk-conversion skip). Plan-type phased; 5 phases including 1 hard stop at end.

history.rationale: Multi-phase, three distinct deliverables, public CLI surface touched, no policy gates.

history.summary: All 5 phases executed across 5 commits on branch wo/rag-index-chunk-converter-impl. P1 reproduction baseline (re-framed FOLLOW-UP-3 mid-flight: B2=incremental state surviving --reset, NOT Python chunker bug; B3 added: chunk-converter isFile defense). P2 vector store path fix. P3 exit-code semantics. P4 B2+B3 merged fix. P5 LLOYD E2E + rag-search-side fixes folded in.

history.result: 4/4 legs OK (scan/populate/docs/rag). LLOYD chunks_indexed went 0/21 -> 21/21. rag-search returned 10 LLOYD-Python hits. Zero pollution in coderef-core.

handoff.note: Workorder complete. Branch wo/rag-index-chunk-converter-impl pushed to origin (HEAD: 358b22b). User-initiated merge to main is the next discrete step.
